Highlighted Features

One platform. Complete simulation control.

Comprehensive Management

Simulation scheduling, recording, assessment, and reporting in a single platform. Less time managing tools, more time managing simulations.

Patient Simulator Compatibility

Integrates with your existing patient simulators to capture vital signs — protecting your existing investment and enhancing simulation delivery.

Ehli: AI-Enhanced Evaluation

Ehli handles the repetitive, time-consuming tasks by scoring checklists, generating transcriptions, and surfacing key moments. Allow your faculty to focus on teaching, not ticking boxes.

Scalability alongside your programme

From a single simulation room to a multi-room, interconnected centre. LearningSpace grows with your programme.

Summary

One platform for your entire simulation workflow

Used by over 600 institutions across 30 countries, LearningSpace is Elevate Healthcare's simulation management and debriefing platform — capturing HD video, simulator data, assessments, and observer notes in a single web-based system.

Running a simulation programme means managing recordings, assessments, schedules, reports, and equipment across disconnected systems. LearningSpace consolidates that entire workflow. Faculty get the tools they need for structured, evidence-based debriefing. Programme leads get the data they need for accreditation and compliance. And your centre runs more efficiently from day one.

Download the LearningSpace Brochure
USPs

Built for the realities of simulation centre management and debriefing

What makes LearningSpace an ideal solution for your simulation management?

High-definition recording and playback

HD video capture with live streaming, real-time annotation, and built-in intercom — so nothing gets missed. Upload, share, and review sessions from a centralised library for structured debriefing.

Robust assessment

Design scenarios and evaluation checklists that can be scored in real time or post-session. Map them to curriculum objectives, track performance at individual and cohort level, and generate exportable reports for accreditation and compliance.

ISO 27001 certified security

Role-based access controls, encrypted data, secure storage, and regular audits ensure LearningSpace meets the data security standards required by universities and NHS trusts.

Scheduling, inventory & simulation control

Everything you need to run your simulation centre efficiently: calendar-based scheduling, a centralised management dashboard, and mobile tools for standardised patient coordination in Enterprise. Equipment and resource inventory management (Enterprise) keeps track of availability and reduces scheduling conflicts.

Inventory & SP tools: Enterprise

Key Features

Key Simulation Centre Management Features

HD Recording & Playback ▼
Multi-camera HD video, real-time streaming, annotation tools, intercom, on-demand review, file sharing.
Ehli — AI-Powered Evaluation ▼
Automated checklist scoring with confidence levels, AI transcription, Jump to Source (navigate directly to the video moment behind any score), Show Key Insights (AI-highlighted critical moments from the session), SOAP note scoring.
Structured Debriefing ▼
Timestamped video evidence, observer notes, checklist data, annotation tools for reflective post-simulation debriefing.
OSCE Management Enterprise ▼
End-to-end OSCE delivery — scheduling, recording, AI-assisted scoring, and reporting from a single dashboard.
Scheduling & Simulation Control ▼
Calendar-based scheduling, notifications, simulation widget for manikin control, Maestro integration, all in a centralised dashboard.
Standardised Patient Management Enterprise ▼
Mobile standardised patient onboarding and scheduling tools alongside simulation sessions.
Inventory & Resource Tracking Enterprise ▼
Equipment management with real-time calendar integration. Reduce scheduling conflicts, track usage across locations.
Accreditation & Compliance ▼
Auto-generated activity logs, performance reports, curriculum maps aligned with INACSL. Audit-ready documentation.
Remote Access ▼
Web-based access lets faculty and learners review sessions, complete assessments, and participate in debriefing from any location.
Ehli — AI Spotlight
AI Feature Spotlight

Ehli — AI that supports your simulation faculty

Ehli is LearningSpace's built-in AI assistant, purpose-built for simulation evaluation. It scores checklists with confidence ratings, generates session transcriptions, and links insights directly to timestamped video evidence, so faculty can review faster and focus their expertise where it matters most.

Every AI-suggested score is clearly flagged for faculty review. The decision is always yours.

Book your demonstration
Evidence-Based Debriefing
Core Capability

Evidence-based debriefing

Debriefing is where learning happens — but only if faculty have the evidence to guide it. LearningSpace gives your team timestamped HD video, integrated observer notes, checklist data, and real-time annotations in a single debriefing view. Every critical moment is documented and reviewable, so debriefing conversations are grounded in well-documented scenario events.

Tier Comparison

Two tiers. One platform. Matched to your programme.

Whether you're running a single-room skills lab or a multi-room simulation centre, there's a LearningSpace configuration that fits.

FAQs

LearningSpace Frequently Asked Questions

What is LearningSpace? ▼
LearningSpace is a web-based simulation management and debriefing platform developed by Elevate Healthcare. It captures HD video, simulator data, assessments, and observer notes in a single system, used by over 600 institutions across 30 countries.
How does LearningSpace improve simulation centre efficiency? ▼
LearningSpace consolidates scheduling, recording, assessment, reporting, and inventory into one platform, eliminating the need to switch between disconnected tools.
Can I use my existing patient simulators with LearningSpace? ▼
Yes. LearningSpace can capture vital signs from your existing patient simulators. The Sim & Skills sales team can confirm compatibility with your specific equipment.
How does LearningSpace support simulation programme accreditation? ▼
LearningSpace supports accreditation by auto-generating activity logs, exportable reports, and curriculum maps that align with standards such as INACSL.
Is LearningSpace suitable for university and hospital settings? ▼
LearningSpace is designed for use across nursing schools, medical schools, NHS trust simulation centres, interprofessional education programmes, and more.
How does LearningSpace handle data security? ▼
LearningSpace is ISO 27001 certified — the international standard for information security management. This ensures the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of all data. Additional measures include role-based access controls, encryption, and regular security audits.
Does LearningSpace require per-user licences? ▼
No. LearningSpace provides a flexible, scalable and secure platform for recording, annotating and assessing training sessions from anywhere, on any device without the need for additional user licenses.
Can LearningSpace be installed on-site? ▼
Yes. LearningSpace supports both on-site and hosted deployment, giving your institution full control over how and where your simulation data is stored. This is particularly relevant for NHS trusts and universities with specific data residency or governance requirements. Speak to the Sim & Skills sales team to discuss the best option for your centre.
How long does installation take? ▼
Installation varies by centre size. Speak to the Sim & Skills sales team for a tailored discussion about LearningSpace for your institution.
